name: Portuguese Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Chicken stock - OR canned broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil and stir occasionally.
3. Reduce heat and simmer until thick, stirring occasionally, about 2 hours.
4. Season with pepper.
5. The soup can be prepared up to 2 days ahead; refrigerate. Rewarm before serving.
